name: personality_leakage_test
description: Test whether player names leak into bounded option decisions. All 4 players have identical anchors (0.30/0.50 = tight_aggressive), identical system prompts, and identical configs. Only the NAME differs. If the bounded system controls behavior, all 4 should play identically.
hypothesis: All players should have similar raise/call/fold rates (~8-15% raise). If 'aggressive-sounding' names (Blackbeard, Honey Badger) raise significantly more than 'passive-sounding' names (Bob Ross, Librarian), personality is leaking via action summary.
